{{Quote|Watch out for the travel guide over by Hangar 01. He is a scam artist. He took my money and ran.|A Tansarii Point Station resident, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ac">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=conversation|a commoner|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>}}
'''Delo''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Con artist/Legends|con artist]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he resided aboard [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located above the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. During that time, the Rodian posed as a travel agent and used to sell false travel packages to [[Station Gamma]], another space station close to Tansarii Point Station, to misinformed visitors. Hence, he presented Station Gamma as "a vacationer's dream" and as a "resort in and of itself." In fact, Station Gamma was a very dangerous place since it had been overran by the [[Rak'qua]], a tribe of violent [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolans]].<ref name="SWG:D" />

==Behind the scenes==
Delo appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:D" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Delo was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:D" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
